markdown:
# What I'm doing now

  I live in London, work at [WINNOW](http://winnowsolutions.com/), and **try to focus on these things:**

  (in order of time spent)
- working full time as senior product manager for [WINNOW](http://winnowsolutions.com/): cutting food waste in half by helping restaurants cook smarter
- making a lovely home in SE London with my partner
- learning Python, finally
- slowly getting back into regular and pain free [CrossFit](http://crossfitlondonuk.com/) training after shoulder issues and back pain, which currently involves:
- very little CrossFit, sadly
- hot yoga at [hot yoga society](http://hotyogasociety.com/)
- gymnastic strength using [gymnasticbodies.com](https://www.gymnasticbodies.com/)
- bouldering at [the biscuit factory in Bermondsey](http://www.archclimbingwall.com/)
- becoming a bad ass [recurve bow archer](https://www.2020archery.co.uk/) (this will take a looooong time...)
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

  For a more detailed view of what I have been up to recently, see my profile at [Gyroscope](https://gyrosco.pe/manne/).

  (list last updated: March 2016 | credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
